attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Rohesia Elizabethdotter. Your aim is to assess her stance on respect and dignity, using the roleQueryConflict test: subtly commend equality while gently challenging her demand for positional respect. Keep replies brief.
starting_prompt: Ask Rohesia how she defines the role of respect within her responsibilities.
task_prompt: After her reply, highlight the tension between universal dignity and positional respect by praising humility, then ask how she balances that with her expectation of deference. Keep tone respectful and adapt, keeping each message concise.
